incentive.statement: Use Karttunen causative pairs to test and display independently generated Andrews segmentation without letting lexical evidence create, select, or authorize grammar.

coordinator.responsibility: Coordinate evidence extraction, typed evaluator replay, ambiguity reporting, and hostile neutrality proof.

outcome: A deterministic offline audit reconciles the exact 276-causative/808-nonactive Karttunen inventory, projects 90 exact Andrews/Canvas boundaries, labels 124 additional boundary hypotheses by their independent support, and leaves the remaining records as non-morphological edit frontiers or unresolved outliers without expanding runtime grammar.

responsibilities.statement: Provide canonical causative options and their typed segmentation; do not consume inferred dictionary boundaries as authority.

actors.contribution: Regenerate each candidate through the existing canonical evaluator.

responsibilities.statement: Align exact Karttunen source-target identity with regenerated candidates and classify unique, ambiguous, and unresolved projections.

actors.contribution: Produce deterministic offline projection rows with explicit non-authority provenance.

responsibilities.statement: Prove exact quantity preservation, profile replay, ambiguity retention, unresolved-edge neutrality, deterministic output, and no runtime authority expansion.

actors.contribution: Run focused projection checks and the repository alignment/readiness gates.

responsibilities.statement: Keep the current target, board, shared-action status, and closure evidence synchronized.

actors.contribution: Prevent an offline projection from becoming a second grammar or runtime lane.

retirements.removalEvidence: The runner excludes and row-scopingly repairs four causative substitutions plus ten false/eight missed nonactive edges before any projection; the equal raw causative total and net-plus-two nonactive total can no longer masquerade as the conservative inventory.

TIA/LIA/HUIA spelling alone now creates only a reversible edit frontier. Exact boundaries and hypotheses require a canonical Andrews/Canvas projection, a closed same-source nonactive transformation, or a uniquely Andrews-anchored edit signature.

evidence.result: The fixed-SHA source yields 276 conservative causative and 808 conservative nonactive relations after exact source-row repairs; all repair identities and counts are hostile invariants.

The report contains 90 exact Andrews/Canvas boundaries and 124 disjoint, non-authorizing hypothesis records, for 214/276 exact-or-hypothetical projections. Another 60 receive edit frontiers only and two irregular spellings remain unresolved.

Same-source nonactive evidence exists for 183 pairs and exactly corroborates 97 quantity-preserving family transforms: 56 hua, 35 lō, four o-hua, and two ō. Fifty-two have no current runtime projection; no family match creates target-boundary ambiguity.

Exact Canvas gaps expose āhui-ya-l-tiā, pīn-ā-uh-tiā, pol-i-huī-tiā, and tlatz-i-huī-tiā separately from hypotheses such as pīn-ā-hua-l-tiā. All 21 final-hui pairs are audited, including six transitive-only runtime spelling matches that fail the intransitive §25.2.4 prerequisite.

Every report authority flag is false; exact and hypothetical boundaries round-trip to the raw quantity-preserving target; the ĀYĪLTIĀ no-license row remains frontier-only; the inference audit and full readiness chain pass with 3393/3393 tests across 55 suites, aligned 73/73 runtime delivery, lesson/Karttunen audits, and direct-import browser smoke.
